project.name: Headhunt Manager (FDIWork)
project.type: Next.js 16 App Router, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS
project.status: Production app is live on Vercel. PR #1, PR #2, and PR #3 are merged into master; original checkout D:\MH\Headhunt_pj is updated to merge commit b863d34.

features: Authentication via NextAuth for CRM and custom JWT for employer portal
Candidate management with tags, seniority, skills, reminders, notes, multi-CV, languages, work history, trash/restore
Client management with contacts, revenue summary, paginated select, and client import
Job management with kanban pipeline, smart assign modal, job bridge card, and FDIWork sync
Dashboard with Suspense streaming pipeline overview, recent activity, and revenue widgets
FDIWork public website with cached jobs, companies, apply flow, employer portal, and ISR blog
Admin moderation with application import to CRM, employer linking, packages, and employer management
Excel/CSV import for candidates and clients with preview, validation, dedup, and error reporting
Production hardening with Redis rate limit, Sentry, Neon pooled Postgres, and GIN trigram text search optimization
7-stage recruitment pipeline with dedicated Submissions module and dual 'Import & Submit' action for seamless candidate shortlisting
Employer notification bell, safer employer job posting actions, and improved admin package assignment/search flows
Shared public job taxonomy, blog detail routes, simplified public apply UX, and a shipped homepage redesign with compact VietnamWorks-inspired search behavior and section dot navigation
Shipped public UX fixes: crawlable Link-based pagination, IntersectionObserver homepage section dots, Vietnamese employer carousel labels, and Lighthouse accessibility follow-ups

database_schema.summary: ATS CRM + employer portal + public job board + ops/audit tracking
database_schema.relationships_explained: CRM User owns Candidates, Clients, and Jobs. JobOrder links Client, assigned recruiter, and pipeline rows. Employer optionally links to CRM Client and owns public JobPostings.
notable_constraints: Candidate import dedups by email/phone; client import dedups by companyName/website

conventions: Server Actions return success/error objects and user-facing errors stay in Vietnamese
All ViewerScope data access logic must use shared helpers from access-scope.ts instead of inline duplicated scopes
Dashboard logic uses React Suspense to stream multiple isolated widgets instead of blocking layout
Neon is the canonical Postgres provider; prefer pooled URL in production
Expensive public data endpoints (homepage, filters) heavily leverage unstable_cache
ILIKE string search queries rely on GIN trigram indexes for performance speedups
Public visual direction uses layered navy backgrounds, warm-neutral section surfaces, and reserves orange for primary CTAs or value signals
When releasing from a dirty design branch, isolate intended files in a clean worktree instead of pushing the whole branch
Preview or production deploy choice must be explicit; linked Vercel git pushes from master become production
Public pagination should use next/link hrefs instead of router.push button handlers so prefetch, middle-click, and crawlers work
Homepage section active-state tracking should use IntersectionObserver with rootMargin -42% 0px -58% 0px instead of scroll-frame layout reads
security_notes: Employer JWT TTL is 1 day and employer must remain ACTIVE
Public apply, candidate CV upload, and avatar upload validate file signatures by magic bytes
Avatar upload enforces ownership checks to prevent IDOR
infra_notes: Primary live aliases now include https://fdiwork.vercel.app and https://fdiwork-git-master-tungpm21s-projects.vercel.app
Linked Vercel project config exists locally in .vercel/project.json for project headhunt-manager-deploy
Prisma client uses @prisma/adapter-pg with pg Pool (min 15) and pooled connection preference
postinstall runs prisma generate to keep Vercel production builds in sync with schema
known_issues_fixed: Monolithic dashboard bottleneck fixed via React Suspense streaming
Scattered access-control logic centralized into access-scope.ts
ILIKE full table scans eliminated via idx_*_trgm indexes for JobOrder, Client, Candidate, Employer, and JobPosting
Public page dynamic-render performance fixed via unstable_cache and ISR
Parser header normalization now handles Vietnamese D/d so import maps phone/address columns correctly
Search suggestion hook no longer triggers setState-after-unmount warnings
Homepage overflow, weak CTA contrast, and undersized carousel dots were fixed across desktop/tablet/mobile
Restored contact page now passes lint after replacing raw anchor navigation with next/link
Merged public UX PR fixes Pagination navigation, HomepageSectionDots performance, and EmployerBannerCarousel English labels
Merged Lighthouse follow-up fixes FDI orange contrast, hero location dropdown accessible naming, and public JobCard heading order
